its been a while, ive always played this tame up until early 2023, this was so special to me. Thank you for the memories, fish game :)

This game is peak   I remember playing it in like 2022 or 2023.  And it was so fun  i miss it 
￼
I remember beating backrooms on a random Tuesday night. That was possibly top 10 nights of my life.
April, 3rd, 2026 Lets host a even called We Are Fish for a all day event to have fun one last time.

This game is really fun! I’ve had a really great time playing it over the past 3 years and really I like that it has so much gamemodes but my absolute favorite gamemode is definitely the backrooms , although the game has a non active community as of now I still enjoy playing even if I’m just swimming around by myself as a little fish :)

reviews.review_title: False reporting got my kid banned
reviews.review_description: I’m really frustrated. I sit here and watch my child play the game. And other kids constantly ganging up and being bullies to her, false reporting her and getting her banned from the game for absolutely no reason! She minds her business and is the sweetest kid and did not deserve this at all. Moderators need to do better!

developer_response.body:
Reporting doesn't immediately mean a player will get banned.
If we notice a lot of reports at once (Common when people gang report) we will discard the report until a certain point.
I cannot give exact details on how we moderate, as that information can be abused, but we do our absolute best to maintain a fair system while also getting rid of rule breaking players.

If she got banned, we'll be happy to take an appeal at contact@fishgamevr.com.

Thanks for your understanding ^^

reviews.review_description: Trash

reviews.review_description: Super hard to move, Toxic Community, When i hit someone with a Sword they don’t go to Jail Of The Dead.

developer_response.body:
Hello KillerKat!
A fish has 3 lives, you can see your lives on the sword.
The toxic community is a thing I'm looking at, although it's a bit hard when I can't be in all lobbies at once - I recently released a report tab on the Fish Pad, please report a fish if they're breaking the rules.

I hope to see you again soon!
